name: living-lanka-marketplace
description: Living Lanka — full stack marketplace (frontend + microservices + API gateway)

scripts.build:services: npm run stop && dotnet build services/identity-service/src/IdentityService.Api/IdentityService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/profile-service/src/ProfileService.Api/ProfileService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/listing-service/src/ListingService.Api/ListingService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/media-service/src/MediaService.Api/MediaService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/payment-service/src/PaymentService.Api/PaymentService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/notification-service/src/NotificationService.Api/NotificationService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/chat-service/src/ChatService.Api/ChatService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/logging-service/src/LoggingService.Api/LoggingService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/gateway/src/MarketPlace.Gateway/MarketPlace.Gateway.csproj
